title: Towny Economy+
description: Start taxing, sanctioning, and more with the people in your civilizations!
body:
# 🏛️ TaxyTowny

TaxyTowny is a powerful economy and governance plugin that brings real-world political mechanics into your Minecraft server. Create dynamic systems of taxation, economic sanctions, and player- or nation-based deals to shape how your world functions.

Perfect for roleplay servers, geopolitics servers, Towny/nation servers, or experimental economy servers.

## ✨ Features

### 💰 Taxes

Set global, regional, or player-based taxes

Automatic tax collection at configurable intervals

Support for income tax, transaction tax, or flat taxes

Tax revenue can flow to governments, towns, nations, or server banks

### 🚫 Sanctions

Apply economic sanctions to players, towns, or nations

Block trading, restrict commands, or increase tax rates

Time-based or permanent sanctions

Sanction logs for transparency and moderation

### 🤝 Deals & Agreements

Create economic or political deals between players, towns, or nations

Trade benefits, tax exemptions, or sanction relief

Time-limited or permanent agreements

Fully configurable permissions and conditions

### ⚙️ Customization

Fully configurable via config.yml

Permission-based controls

Vault support for economy integration

Compatible with most major economy and Towny-style plugins

### 🧠 Use Cases

Government and political roleplay servers

Geopolitical simulation servers

Nation-based SMPs

Advanced economy experimentation

### 🔐 Permissions & Commands

Granular permissions for admins, officials, and players

Easy-to-use commands for managing taxes, sanctions, and deals

Admin override options for moderation

### 📦 Why TaxyTowny?

TaxyTowny turns your server into a living system where decisions matter, power has consequences, and economics drive gameplay.**
